# servicenow_role (Data Source)

`servicenow_role` data source can be used to retrieve information of a single role in ServiceNow by its suffix

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing role in ServiceNow by its suffix.
data "servicenow_role" "example" {
  suffix = "admin"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `suffix` (String) The suffix of the role name. The full role name is prefixed with the application scope.

### Read-Only

- `assignable_by` (String) Comma-separated list of role names that can assign this role to users.
- `description` (String) Description of the role and its purpose.
- `elevated_privilege` (Boolean) If true, the role requires elevated privilege to be granted.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String) The full name of the role including application scope prefix.
- `protection_policy` (String) Determines how application files are protected when downloaded or installed. Can be empty for no protection, 'read' for read-only protection or 'protected'.
- `scope` (String) Associates a resource to a specific application ID in ServiceNow.
